body: Project 'A11yAI Accessibility Defect Automation' scaffolded. PRD: prds/projects/a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation.md

BLOCKER: prds/projects/a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation.md does not exist (only _template.md present). Kanban file also missing. Dispatch scrum-master after PRD is created. Project cannot be planned until both files exist.

SPRINT START: Move card-1 (Repo scaffold — TypeScript, ESLint, axe-core + playwright, a11yai scan CLI stub) from Backlog to In Progress. This is the sequencing root — cards 2-5 all depend on it. Dispatch scrum-master to plan card-1 implementation steps (TypeScript init, ESLint config, axe-core + playwright wiring, CLI stub). PRD §v0.1 acceptance criteria apply.
